Title: The Mercer Tailored Polo
Body (HTML):
Cut closer to the body for a sharp, modern silhouette. Same performance fabric as the Anderson with a slimmer chest and tapered waist. For guys who like their polos fitted, not boxy. Moisture-wicking, UPF 50+, four-way stretch.

Fit: Tailored - runs approximately one size smaller than our standard fit. If between sizes, size up.
Image Alt Text: The Mercer Tailored Polo - Man in red polo playing golf

Title: The Beckett Relaxed Polo
Body (HTML):
Extra room through the chest and shoulders for guys who prefer a looser, more comfortable fit. Same premium performance fabric with a relaxed cut that doesn't cling. Perfect for warmer rounds when you want airflow.

Fit: Relaxed - runs approximately one size larger than our standard fit. If between sizes, size down.
Image Alt Text: The Beckett Relaxed Polo - Golfer at sunset
